answer: The Florida escrow reconciliation was overstated because settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 joined party_identity_bridge using normalized_tax_id, which incorrectly matched multiple buyer and seller party roles within the same closing, duplicating escrow disbursements in finance.disbursement_recon_daily. The correct join key is closing_party_role_id.

facts.affected_segment: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.remediation: Switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title
facts.root_cause: normalized_tax_id matched multiple buyer and seller party roles inside the same closing, duplicating escrow disbursements
